code: export class BlackjackModuleParser{constructor(){this._hasInfo=false;this._tableId=null;this._minBet=null;this._maxBet=null;}flush(){this._hasInfo=false;this._tableId=null;this._minBet=null;this._maxBet=null;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._hasInfo=wrapper.readBoolean();if(this._hasInfo){this._tableId=wrapper.readInt();this._minBet=wrapper.readInt();this._maxBet=wrapper.readInt();}return true;}get hasInfo(){return this._hasInfo;}get tableId(){return this._tableId;}get minBet(){return this._minBet;}get maxBet(){return this._maxBet;}}
